name: xk6-kafka
description: xk6-kafka is a k6 extension to load test Apache Kafka
author: Mostafa Moradian <mostafamoradian0@gmail.com>

scripts.generate-docs:v2: yarn run sync-docs:v2 && yarn exec typedoc --options typedoc.json && prettier -w README.md index.d.ts typedoc.json v2
scripts.check-docs:v2: yarn run generate-docs:v2 && git diff --exit-code -- v2/index.d.ts v2/docs
